scripts.vercel-build: prisma generate && node scripts/migrate-deploy.mjs && next build
scripts.test: node --import tsx --test src/lib/visual-subjects.test.ts src/lib/episode-thumbnail.test.ts src/lib/audio-segments.test.ts src/lib/animatic-render.test.ts src/lib/animatic-character-refs.test.ts src/lib/vertex-retry.test.ts src/lib/vertex-imagen.test.ts src/lib/animatic-frame-image.test.ts src/lib/math-foundation-latex.test.ts src/lib/pattern-matrix-opening-video.test.ts src/lib/pattern-matrix-frame-prompt.test.ts src/lib/dialogue-illustration-prompt.test.ts src/lib/episode-character-bible.test.ts src/lib/episode-visual-bible.test.ts src/lib/generate-story.test.ts src/lib/episode-hosts-video-bookends.test.ts src/lib/clearsight-brief-opening-video.test.ts src/lib/pattern-matrix-intro-timeline.test.ts src/lib/channel-intro-segments.test.ts src/lib/channel-intro-timeline.test.ts src/lib/clearsight-brief-intro-images.test.ts src/lib/clearsight-brief-intro-video-clips.test.ts src/lib/generation-stuck-constants.test.ts src/lib/generation-duration.test.ts src/lib/intro-frame-video-plan.test.ts src/lib/episode-quiz.test.ts src/lib/host-character-ref.test.ts src/lib/scene-flow-lite-visual.test.ts src/lib/scene-flow-lite.test.ts src/lib/plan-entitlements.test.ts src/lib/ads/vast.test.ts src/lib/ads/test-ad.test.ts src/lib/ads/surfaces.test.ts
scripts.generate:clearsight-brief-character-refs: USE_HERO_REFERENCE=1 REGEN_CHARACTER_REFS=1 CHARACTER_REFS_ONLY=1 SHOW_ID=clearsight-brief node scripts/generate-host-art.mjs
scripts.generate:pattern-matrix-character-refs: USE_HERO_REFERENCE=1 REGEN_CHARACTER_REFS=1 CHARACTER_REFS_ONLY=1 SHOW_ID=clearsight-math node scripts/generate-host-art.mjs
